title: Read the following e-mail and answer the questions that follow.
description:
From: Todd Hamilton <t.hamilton@happytext.abc>
To: Gina Parker <gina.p@eastbridgehistorymuseum.com>
Date: January 10
Subject: An interview

Dear Ms. Parker,
I'm Todd Hamilton. I am a student at Peterson High School. My social studies teacher, Mr. Garcia, gave me your e-mail address. As you probably have heard from Mr. Garcia, I will give a presentation about a tourist spot in this town. I would like to speak about your history museum because it is visited by a large number of tourists from both inside and outside the country.

Information about the museum's history, events, historic buildings, and exhibitions can be found on your website, but there are a few other things I would like to ask you about. Those include information about what your museum staff does to attract visitors, what makes your museum more attractive than others, and so on.

If you don't mind, would you let me have an interview with you and your staff on a day that is convenient for you? Also, may I take some photos of the museum, as I would like to make slides to show in the presentation? If an interview is not possible, I hope you will continue to allow me to ask questions by e-mail.

Sincerely,
Todd Hamilton

questions.question: How was Todd able to contact Ms. Parker?
choices: By getting her contact information from his teacher.
By finding her e-mail address on the museum's website.
By being introduced to her by a worker in the museum.
By meeting her directly when he visited the museum.
questions.answer: By getting her contact information from his teacher.

questions.question: What is one thing Todd wants to ask about the museum?
choices: Things visitors can do at the museum.
The efforts that the museum makes.
The main points of the events.
The way to become a museum staff member.
questions.answer: The efforts that the museum makes.

questions.question: Todd wants to
choices: make slides of the presentation with the staff members.
send the pictures of the museum by e-mail.
use pictures taken in the museum in the presentation.
show some slides of his high school life.
questions.answer: use pictures taken in the museum in the presentation.
